name: Company enrichment from website content
description: Scrapes a company website with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract structured data (market, industry, target audience, value proposition), and saves the enrichment results to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: OpenAI GPT-3: Company enrichment from website content

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

googleSheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving data

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for status notification

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for enrichment status updates

companyUrl.description: Company website URL to scrape and enrich (e.g. 'https://example.com')

companyName.description: Company name (if known, otherwise extracted from website)

spreadsheetName.description: Name for the Google Sheets spreadsheet

steps.name: Create Google Sheets spreadsheet for enrichment data
Build Slack Block Kit enrichment summary
